milestones.summary: [Tag](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/releases/tag/migrate-runner-v1.0.0) · Published to npm as `@nekostack/migrate-runner` (Apache-2.0).
Schema-data migration runner library — the downstream package that executes authored migrations against real records.
First stable release. **Public API frozen.** No source changes from v0.8.0 — this milestone freezes the exported surface and ships release metadata (Apache-2.0 license; the `nekostack` metapackage).
Schema-data migration planning + provenance verification + stub generation.
Registry-lite + `neko schema *`.
Runtime validation as a NekoStack-owned workflow on the v0.2 source-generator + v0.5 composition foundation.
Composition layer on the v0.1 IR foundation.
Fourth generator on the v0.1 IR foundation.
Third generator on the v0.1 IR foundation.
Patch release on the v0.2 line — proof artifacts + generator output polish from the dogfood pass.
First package phase accepted under [`standards/package-development.md`](../../standards/package-development.md).
[Tag](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/releases/tag/cli-v1.0.1) · Patch fix for npm binary registration.
[Tag](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/releases/tag/cli-v1.0.0) · First public release.
[Tag](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/releases/tag/theme-v1.0.0) · First public release.
[Tag](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/releases/tag/ui-v1.0.1) · Patch fix for npm publish artifact hygiene.
[Tag](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/releases/tag/ui-v1.0.0) · First public release.
PR [#89](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/pull/89) · Stable rule catalog, full docs, CI integration.
PR [#88](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/pull/88) · merge commit [`2a9dd2c`](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/commit/2a9dd2cda8dcc69e852a25a4d44cdb91cb913a86).
PR #86 · Module-boundary and quality rules.
PR #TBD · Security rules + first auto-fixer milestone.
PR #TBD · Framework configs milestone.
PR #TBD · Bootstrap milestone.
[Tag](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/releases/tag/nekostack-v1.1.1) · Patch bump to track cli and ui patch releases.
[Tag](https://github.com/cmclicker/NekoStack/releases/tag/nekostack-v1.1.0) · First public release of the metapackage.

next_actions: Five packages published at v1.0+: schema, cli, migrate-runner, theme, ui. Metapackage at v1.1.1.
